{{Quote|She was not bored before you came! I was enough for her. She doesn't need Ona. She doesn't need you. She has me. All this talk distracts her.|Nil boasts to [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] of how important he was to [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]''</ref>}}
'''Nil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quint (species)|Quint]] who worked for [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. He worshiped the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] for her brilliance, but she didn't seem to acknowledge his praise.

When [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] was captured by [[Ona Nobis]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] under Zan Arbor's employ, Nil was tasked with keeping the subject under watch. After a few tests, Qui-Gon distracted Nil and momentarily knocked the Quint unconscious in his escape attempt. But the Jedi was hit by a [[paralysis dart]] and Nil had brought him back to his cell. Furious at being outsmarted, Nil suggested that Qui-Gon should be killed; Zan Arbor concurred, yet decided to put that on hold.

Once more, Nil had been bested and fooled by a Jedi. When [[Astri Oddo]], disguised as Ona Nobis, brought in a "captured" [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], the Quint became suspicious. Obi-Wan wasted no time in using Nobis' stolen [[Whip (weapon)|whip]] to trap Nil and dumped him in an empty holding cell before he and Astri could rescue Qui-Gon.

When Zan Arbor had to run away after being discovered by the Jedi, Nil was no longer useful and she injected him with a lethal [[Poison/Legends|poison]].
